allow:
Bash(gh pr create --base main --head dev --title "Phase 6A: Market System and UI Improvements" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- **Dynamic Market System**: Prices fluctuate ±30% based on market trends and player sales
- **Contract System**: Auto-generated delivery contracts with bonus rewards
- **Market UI Panel**: View prices, trends, and active contracts in-game
- **Main Menu Redesign**: Background image with clean text-only buttons and hover effects
- **Camera Fix**: Scrolling in UI panels no longer zooms the map

## Changes
### New Files
- `systems/market_manager.gd` - MarketManager singleton for dynamic pricing

### Modified Files
- `core/save_manager.gd` - Save/load market state
- `project.godot` - Add MarketManager autoload
- `systems/production_manager.gd` - Use dynamic prices from MarketManager
- `scenes/world_map/world_map.gd` - Market panel UI logic
- `scenes/world_map/world_map.tscn` - Market panel and button nodes
- `scenes/world_map/camera_controller.gd` - Block zoom over UI panels
- `scenes/ui/main_menu.tscn` - New background and button styling

### Assets
- `assets/sprites/generated/Gemini_Generated_Image_menubackground.png` - Menu background

## Test plan
- [ ] Start new game, open Market Prices panel - verify prices display with trends
- [ ] Wait 10+ seconds, verify prices update and panel refreshes
- [ ] Sell products, verify supply pressure affects prices
- [ ] Wait 60 seconds, verify contract appears in market panel
- [ ] Scroll in market/production panels - verify map doesn''t zoom
- [ ] Save and load game - verify market state persists
- [ ] Check main menu styling with background image

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.ai/code\)
EOF
\)")
